sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27573" key="di/fas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δίφας</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n27573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">serpent,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.13</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δίβαν, δίφατον.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
